purpose: Same-shape low-intrusion timing profile for the 4xMI350 GBS128/MBS1/GA32 explicit shared-KV no-AC run, using additive step timing, DSv4 profile timing, dense linear backward timing, and MORI AITER timing sidecars without torch profiler traces.

additive_late_step_decomposition.samples: 12 rank-step samples from steps 4-6 after filtering zero-phase records
additive_late_step_decomposition.read: The same-shape AMD profile is still dominated by backward and the forward/backward wrapper residual. Forward and loss are visible, but they are not the lead wall.

sharedkv_sparse_attention_timing.read: SparseAttnSharedkvGrad is still attention's kernel target: the compressed dKV scatter plus dKV math is the largest part of the sparse attention call. But at the 4x GBS128 e2e shape it is roughly a couple seconds per rank-step, not the dominant 25.5s backward wall.

lightning_indexer_kl_timing.read: SparseLightningIndexerGradKLLoss does not appear as a direct public-wrapper timing marker in this sidecar. The captured indexer linear-gradient pieces are tiny compared with SparseAttnSharedkvGrad and MORI VJP. If exact public-boundary comparison is needed, add a dedicated LI/KL wrapper marker.

skew_signal.read: combine_dx has a long tail: median is small but mean and max are much larger, consistent with dX return wait/skew rather than pure combine math.

mori_moe_timing.read: MORI/AITER routed owner VJP is the largest profiled multi-GPU optimization target. The dominant owner VJP subgroups are recompute forward, wgrad, xgrad/reduce, and W2 dgrad+SwiGLU.

root_cause_ranking.target: MoE/MORI routed backward owner VJP plus dX return skew
root_cause_ranking.evidence: Additive backward is about 25.5s of a 34.6s profiled step; MORI local_vjp.padded median is 77.1ms per call with about 128 calls/rank-step; combine_dx has a 7.3ms median but 26.2ms mean and 188ms max.
The residual between forward_backward_call and model_forward+loss+backward is about 3.72s median per late step, roughly 10.8% of the profiled step.

Per-call scatter median is 13.77ms and dkv_math median is 7.95ms; rough stage-median total is about 1.98s per rank-step. It remains the attention-side kernel target but is not the largest e2e bucket at this distributed shape.
Additive loss is about 1.15s per profiled late step with CE2.

commands_run: RUN_ID=torchtitan_dsv4_explicit_sharedkv_noac_lowintrusion_profile_4x_s4096_gbs128_mbs1_ga32_vu_20260605 TARGET_HOST=do-vunguyen-mi350-gpu REMOTE_ROOT=/scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527 IMAGE=onenexus/nexus-titan:rocm722-pytorch-nightly-mori GPUS_PER_NODE=4 CANARY_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0,1,2,3 CANARY_EP=4 CANARY_MBS=1 CANARY_GBS=128 CANARY_SEQ_LEN=4096 CANARY_STEPS=6 CANARY_CHECKPOINT_ENABLE=false CANARY_ACTIVATION_CHECKPOINT_MODE=none CANARY_ENABLE_PROFILING=false CANARY_ENABLE_STRUCTURED_LOGGING=false CANARY_PROFILE_DENSE_LINEAR_BACKWARD=true CANARY_DSV4_PROFILE_TIMING_PATH=/scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527/outputs/torchtitan_dsv4_explicit_sharedkv_noac_lowintrusion_profile_4x_s4096_gbs128_mbs1_ga32_vu_20260605/profiling/dsv4_timing CANARY_DSV4_ADDITIVE_TIMING_PATH=/scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527/outputs/torchtitan_dsv4_explicit_sharedkv_noac_lowintrusion_profile_4x_s4096_gbs128_mbs1_ga32_vu_20260605/profiling/additive_timing CANARY_MORI_AITER_TIMING_PATH=/scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527/outputs/torchtitan_dsv4_explicit_sharedkv_noac_lowintrusion_profile_4x_s4096_gbs128_mbs1_ga32_vu_20260605/profiling/mori_timing CANARY_DSV4_PROFILE_SHAREDKV_BACKWARD=true CANARY_CHUNKED_CE_NUM_CHUNKS=2 CANARY_SHAREDKV_BACKWARD_MODE=explicit_pytorch CANARY_LI_KL_BACKEND=triton_tl_dot CANARY_MOE_COMM_BACKEND=mori CANARY_EXPERIMENTAL_MORI_AITER_MOE=true CANARY_MORI_AITER_BACKWARD_MODE=routed CANARY_MORI_AITER_LOCAL_VJP_MODE=padded CANARY_MORI_AITER_LOCAL_VJP_SWIGLU_BACKEND=triton CANARY_MORI_AITER_OP_CACHE_MODE=backward CANARY_MORI_AITER_BACKWARD_COMBINE_INPUT_MODE=registered CANARY_MORI_AITER_DX_RETURN_MODE=sync CANARY_MORI_SHMEM_HEAP_SIZE=32G CANARY_PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True CANARY_PYTORCH_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True CANARY_PERSIST_JIT_CACHE=auto MASTER_PORT=29633 experiments/2026-05-27-deepseek-v4-amd-pretrain/launchers/torchtitan_direct_deepseek_v4_4x8xmi350_canary.sh run
remote focused JSONL parser over profiling/additive_timing, profiling/dsv4_timing, and profiling/mori_timing
